effectiveGuardrails: Do not modify the check command or exit criteria to force success
Do not skip, disable, or bypass checks to pass the exit condition
If stuck after several iterations, stop and report blockers instead of gaming metrics
kickoffWithGuardrails:
Start the "Changelog Sync After Ship" loop.

Goal: CHANGELOG.md has accurate [Unreleased] entries for this ship
Max iterations: 3
Between iterations run: git log -5 --oneline
Exit when: changelog covers all user-visible changes

Step 1: Review recent commits, write Keep-a-Changelog entries for user-visible changes, and verify completeness.

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.

Guardrails (do not skip):
- Do not modify the check command or exit criteria to force success
- Do not skip, disable, or bypass checks to pass the exit condition
- If stuck after several iterations, stop and report blockers instead of gaming metrics

loop.title: Changelog Sync After Ship
loop.description: After shipping a feature, loop until CHANGELOG.md has a user-facing entry and conventional commits are reflected.

steps.name: Diff since last tag
steps.prompt: List commits and user-visible changes since the last release tag or CHANGELOG section.

steps.name: Write changelog entry
steps.prompt: Add a Keep-a-Changelog entry under [Unreleased]: Added, Changed, Fixed. User-facing language only.

steps.name: Verify format
steps.prompt: Confirm CHANGELOG follows project format and links issues/PRs where relevant.

exitCondition.description: CHANGELOG.md documents all user-visible changes in this ship

Max iterations: 3

Exit when: changelog covers all user-visible changes

Self-pace this loop. After each iteration, run the check command, read the output, and only continue if the exit condition is not met. Stop when the exit condition passes or max iterations is reached. Give a short status update each pass.
loop.author: loops!
